title: Metallic (Easy)
description: The easier version of the metallic datapack. Designed to extend early game without the extra grind.
body:
PLEASE VISIT THE ORIGINAL PAGE FOR MORE INFORMATION ON THE PACK

If you intend to use the mod's built in textures or are using the datapack as a resourcepack, you need [Modefite](https://modrinth.com/mod/modefite-item-definition-backport) to get the sword models working. The resourcepack is also available [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/metallic-(resource-pack)). For best results use the separate resourcepack, on top of all other resources. Otherwise you will need to put mod resources on top of everything else.

This is the easier version of my Metallic datapack ([found here](https://modrinth.com/project/metallic)). It is designed for modpacks that significantly increase the difficulty of minecraft, and make exploring caves much more dangerous. Don't feel bad about using it. The main changes from the original are as following:

-Blasting and smelting produces ingots instead of nuggets

-armor requires pressure plates to craft instead of ingots, to slightly balance the ore economy

-Animals drop leather instead of rabbit hide

-Diamonds now only require smelting, you do not need to craft Diamond Ore out of 4 Deepslate Diamond Ore blocks



For a progression guide and more, please visit the original page. Link can be found above.

If you would like to join the discord server dedicated to my projects, please message me on discord @gravitybreacher for an invite.

Credit for the palette used on the tools goes to MR_CHOO

You are welcome to use this project in your modpacks.
